title: Add Wallet page with balance, Add Money/Withdraw buttons, and Transaction History

requirements.summary: Add '/wallet' route to TanStack Router and navigation link in Header
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to '/wallet' renders the WalletPage without replacing the Header.
A link or icon in the Header navigates to '/wallet'.
The existing '/' and '/registration' routes continue to work.

file_operations.description: Add a new '/wallet' route to the existing TanStack Router configuration, rendering the WalletPage component within the shared RootLayout. Ensure the route follows the same pattern as existing routes ('/' and '/registration') so the Header remains visible.

Add a navigation link or wallet icon in the Header component that navigates to '/wallet'. Use TanStack Router's Link component and apply consistent neon-red accent styling with the Orbitron font. Position the link appropriately within the existing header layout.

requirements.summary: Create WalletPage component with balance card, action buttons, and transaction history section
acceptanceCriteria: The page displays an 'Available Balance' label with a monetary value at the top.
'Add Money' and 'Withdraw' buttons are rendered below the balance card.
Both buttons use neon-red accent styling with neon glow, consistent with the app theme.
A 'Transaction History' section is visible below the buttons.
When the transaction list is empty, an empty-state message is displayed.
Orbitron font is used for section headings; Rajdhani for body/list text.
Dark card background and neon-red border/glow are applied consistently.

file_operations.description: Create a WalletPage component that renders an 'Available Balance' card at the top displaying a balance value (e.g., '₹0.00' as initial state). Below the balance card, render two action buttons side by side: 'Add Money' and 'Withdraw'. Below the buttons, render a 'Transaction History' section heading and a list of transactions. When no transactions exist, show an empty-state message such as 'No transactions yet'. Apply the existing dark neon-red gaming theme: dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron font for headings, Rajdhani for body text, and neon glow on buttons. Use the existing neon-glow utility classes defined in frontend/src/index.css.

requirements.summary: Create React Query hook to fetch wallet data and wire it into WalletPage
acceptanceCriteria: WalletPage fetches balance and transactions from the backend using React Query.
A loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched.
The Available Balance card reflects the value returned by getWalletBalance().
The Transaction History list renders items returned by getTransactions().
When getTransactions() returns an empty array, an empty-state message is shown.

file_operations.description: Add a new React Query hook 'useWallet' that fetches wallet balance via getWalletBalance() and transaction history via getTransactions() from the backend actor. Follow the same pattern as the existing 'useMatches' hook: use the 'useActor' hook to get the backend actor, configure appropriate staleTime and refetchInterval, and return both balance and transactions data with loading and error states.

Wire the WalletPage to use the 'useWallet' hook from useQueries.ts. Display the fetched balance in the Available Balance card, formatting it as currency (e.g., '₹{balance}.00'). Render the transaction list from the fetched data, showing each transaction's type, amount, description, and formatted timestamp. Show a loading skeleton (using similar structure to MatchListSkeleton) while data is fetching. Display an empty-state message when the transaction list is empty.
